arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Gary Neville slams SHOCKING recruitment
arts.sum: Gary Neville has once again taken aim at Manchester United's ownership group following their “poor recruitment” in recent years. I genuinely look around this dressing room and I think to myself, how has this club ended up in a position whereby it has recruited, as Ruben Amorim called it - I’ll quote Ruben Amorim - the worst Manchester United team in history?

arts.ttl: Thousands of Manchester United fans dressed in black protest against Glazer ownership
arts.sum: As many as 5,000 supporters joined in ahead of Sunday’s Premier League match against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Gary Neville slams Man Utd transfers and points finger at four players - but gets facts wrong
arts.sum: Gary Neville has again hit out at Manchester United's ownership for the current state of the club's squad, but he appeared to get his former United teams mixed up

arts.ttl: Roy Keane makes Ruben Amorim point which may make Man United think twice - 'not a good sign'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has been unable to install any improvement at the Reds during his brief tenure at Old Trafford so far.

arts.ttl: Manchester United forward ‘reaches agreement’ over summer exit
arts.sum: Manchester United and Atletico Madrid have reportedly reached an agreement over the transfer of Alejandro Garnacho this summer. Garnacho has been linked with an exit from Old Trafford amid reservations over his suitability to Ruben Amorim’s side and the need for sales to fund a rebuild. In January, the Red Devils were reportedly ready to […] The post Manchester United forward ‘reaches agreement’ over summer exit first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Martinell on bench as Arsenal name team to face Man United
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli has been named on the bench for Arsenal at Manchester United this afternoon. The Brazilian has been out of action for a month after sustaining a hamstring injury against Newcastle in the Carabao Cup semi-final. After five games out, Martinelli is available and named as a substitute. His return is a welcome boost […] The post Martinell on bench as Arsenal name team to face Man United first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man United fans stage major protest against the Glazer family ahead of Premier League clash with Arsenal
arts.sum: Supporters' group The 1958 had announced plans to protest against the club's ownership on Tuesday. Fans were encouraged to wear black to symbolise how their club was 'slowly dying'.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Arsenal: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off at Old Trafford Get in touch: email John | Premier League top scorers One Arsenal change to the starting line-up from Eindhoven in midweekiss Riccardo Calafriori preferred to tough tackling’s Myles Lewis-Skelly at left-back. Mikel Merino plays the Tim Cahill role of converted midfielder. For United, Rasmus Hojlund has been dropped after 19 games without a goal. Joshua Zirkzee will lead the line and, with Bruno Fernandes moving into the frontline, Christian Eriksen comes in to partner Casemiro in what may not be the most mobile midfield. Victor Lindelof replaces Patrick Dorgu and will play as one of the three-man defence. Manuel Ugarte and Harry Maguire are out with injury and likely to be missed. Continue reading...
